answer: It mandates that every fuel manifest filed with the Compact Commerce Directorate carry a cryptographically signed authorization generated on-vessel at the time of departure (the 'Gold' format); paper and unsigned digital submissions are no longer accepted.
evidence_quote: The 2183 Amendment to Article 7.3 of the Commerce Accords mandates that all fuel manifests filed with the Compact Commerce Directorate must carry a cryptographically signed authorization generated on-vessel at time of departure.
